title: Ethereum Price to $40,000? 4 AI Models Assess Standard Chartered’s Call as Tom Lee Remains Bullish
excerpt: Standard Chartered predicts Ethereum could reach $10,000 by the end of 2027 and $40,000 by 2030. Tom Lee argues Ethereum could become a financial settlement...
content_html:
Key Takeaways

  • Standard Chartered predicts Ethereum could reach $10,000 by the end of 2027 and $40,000 by 2030.

  • Tom Lee argues Ethereum could become a financial settlement layer for AI agents as ETF inflows and whale staking increase.

  • 4 AI models assessed the $40,000 prediction — the results were mixed.

Standard Chartered maintains one of Wall Street's most bullish Ethereum forecasts, predicting that ETH could reach $10,000 by the end of 2027 and $40,000 by 2030.

The long-term price outlook for Ethereum is again in the spotlight as BitMine Chairman Tom Lee continues to argue that the blockchain could become a financial layer for AI agents.

Tom Lee Links Ethereum's Future to AI

During a recent CNBC appearance, Lee said AI infrastructure companies remained at the center of an important US strategic initiative.

However, Lee warned that borrowing had made financial markets more vulnerable to short-term declines.

During his July chairman's message, he argued that Ethereum was transitioning from its first phase of development into an "ETH 2.0" era.

"ETH currently, I think, is in its 1.0 phase, and it's transitioning to 2.0," Lee said.

"ETH 2.0 is the period when Ethereum not only becomes central to a lot of growth vectors, but ETH, the asset, becomes money," he said.

One of those growth areas is AI, according to Lee.

The Bitmine chairman predicted that AI agents would eventually produce income, complete transactions, and require their own financial infrastructure.

"AI agents are going to need money," he said.

Lee argued that smart-contract blockchains could provide a trusted barrier between humans and increasingly autonomous AI systems.

"We would argue that blockchain is the barrier between humans and AI," he said.

"I think it's a smart-contract blockchain."

Ethereum Bulls Point to ETFs and Whale Activity

Other Ethereum supporters have also highlighted the blockchain's position in decentralized finance and tokenized assets.

Speaking on The Rollup podcast, crypto commentator DeFi Dad said he remained "irresponsibly long crypto" despite the market downturn.

"In terms of Ethereum, Ethereum continues to be the most reliable and secure network for DeFi," he said.

DeFi Dad argued that institutions issuing tokenized stocks and other real-world assets would favor networks with long security records.

Ethereum has operated for approximately a decade.

He predicted that the value of tokenized real-world assets could eventually eclipse the combined value of native crypto assets.

"If we can bring on trillions — tens of trillions — clearly, over time, that network becomes more and more valuable," he said.
content_text: Standard Chartered believes Ethereum is going to $40,000 by 2030 — Tom Lee can see it going higher. | Source: CCN. Key Takeaways Standard Chartered predicts Ethereum could reach $10,000 by the end of 2027 and $40,000 by 2030. Tom Lee argues Ethereum could become a financial settlement layer for AI agents as ETF inflows and whale staking increase. 4 AI models assessed the $40,000 prediction — the results were mixed. Standard Chartered maintains one of Wall Street's most bullish Ethereum forecasts, predicting that ETH could reach $10,000 by the end of 2027 and $40,000 by 2030. The long-term price outlook for Ethereum is again in the spotlight as BitMine Chairman Tom Lee continues to argue that the blockchain could become a financial layer for AI agents. Tom Lee Links Ethereum's Future to AI During a recent CNBC appearance, Lee said AI infrastructure companies remained at the center of an important US strategic initiative. However, Lee warned that borrowing had made financial markets more vulnerable to short-term declines. During his July chairman's message, he argued that Ethereum was transitioning from its first phase of development into an "ETH 2.0" era. "ETH currently, I think, is in its 1.0 phase, and it's transitioning to 2.0," Lee said. "ETH 2.0 is the period when Ethereum not only becomes central to a lot of growth vectors, but ETH, the asset, becomes money," he said. One of those growth areas is AI, according to Lee. The Bitmine chairman predicted that AI agents would eventually produce income, complete transactions, and require their own financial infrastructure. "AI agents are going to need money," he said. Lee argued that smart-contract blockchains could provide a trusted barrier between humans and increasingly autonomous AI systems. "We would argue that blockchain is the barrier between humans and AI," he said. "I think it's a smart-contract blockchain." Ethereum Bulls Point to ETFs and Whale Activity Other Ethereum supporters have also highlighted the blockchain's position in decentralized finance and tokenized assets. Speaking on The Rollup podcast, crypto commentator DeFi Dad said he remained "irresponsibly long crypto" despite the market downturn. "In terms of Ethereum, Ethereum continues to be the most reliable and secure network for DeFi," he said. DeFi Dad argued that institutions issuing tokenized stocks and other real-world assets would favor networks with long security records. Ethereum has operated for approximately a decade. He predicted that the value of tokenized real-world assets could eventually eclipse the combined value of native crypto assets. "If we can bring on trillions — tens of trillions — clearly, over time, that network becomes more and more valuable," he said.

content_html_zh:
要点

  • 渣打银行预测，到 2027 年底，以太坊的价格可能会达到 10,000 美元，到 2030 年将达到 40,000 美元。
  • Tom Lee 认为，随着 ETF 流入和鲸鱼质押的增加，以太坊可能成为人工智能代理的财务结算层。
  • 4 个人工智能模型评估了 40,000 美元的预测——结果好坏参半。

渣打银行维持华尔街对以太坊最乐观的预测之一，预计 ETH 到 2027 年底将达到 10,000 美元，到 2030 年将达到 40,000 美元。

随着 BitMine 董事长 Tom Lee 继续认为区块链可能成为人工智能代理的金融层，以太坊的长期价格前景再次成为人们关注的焦点。

Tom Lee 将以太坊的未来与人工智能联系起来

李在最近接受 CNBC 采访时表示，人工智能基础设施公司仍然是美国一项重要战略举措的核心。

然而，李警告说，借贷使金融市场更容易受到短期下跌的影响。

在 7 月份的主席致辞中，他认为以太坊正在从发展的第一阶段过渡到“ETH 2.0”时代。

“我认为，ETH 目前处于 1.0 阶段，并且正在向 2.0 阶段过渡，”Lee 说。 他说：“在 ETH 2.0 时期，以太坊不仅成为许多增长载体的核心，而且 ETH 作为资产也成为货币。”

Lee 表示，人工智能是这些增长领域之一。

这位比特矿场董事长预测，人工智能代理最终将产生收入、完成交易，并需要自己的金融基础设施。

“人工智能代理将需要资金，”他说。

Lee 认为，智能合约区块链可以在人类和日益自治的人工智能系统之间提供可信的屏障。

“我们认为区块链是人类和人工智能之间的障碍，”他说。 “我认为这是一个智能合约区块链。”

以太坊牛市指向 ETF 和鲸鱼活动

其他以太坊支持者也强调了区块链在去中心化金融和代币化资产中的地位。

加密货币评论员 DeFi Dad 在 The Rollup 播客上发表讲话时表示，尽管市场低迷，他仍然“不负责任地做多加密货币”。

“就以太坊而言，以太坊仍然是 DeFi 最可靠、最安全的网络，”他说。

DeFi 老爹认为，发行代币化股票和其他现实世界资产的机构将青睐具有长期安全记录的网络。

以太坊已经运行了大约十年。

他预测，代币化的现实世界资产的价值最终可能会超过原生加密资产的综合价值。

“如果我们能够带来数万亿——数十万亿——显然，随着时间的推移，该网络将变得越来越有价值，”他说。
